prompt.content:
ResourceCo wants to use insights from the David Richardson interview to update the Scenario B data center financial model.

Use the highest value in the interview’s Annual OPEX range to update Year 4 OPEX, hold all other assumptions constant, and recalculate Year 4 Operating Profit/EBIT, EBITDA, Net Income, and FCF.

Next, use the lowest value in the interview’s total CAPEX range to update Year 4 CapEx, keeping the updated OPEX. Assume Year 4 depreciation equals 20% of the revised CapEx, then recalculate Year 4 Depreciation, EBITDA, Net Income, and FCF, holding all other assumptions constant.

From the interview, identify the largest Annual OPEX driver and, using the top value in its range, calculate its share of total updated OPEX.

Return all results in a console message. Round percentages to the nearest whole percent and report currency in $M, rounded to $0.01M.

rubrics.name: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Operating Profit/ EBIT value... (ver_23c7b3c130b14d74b6dc2296e3ab34e2)

messages.content: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Operating Profit/ EBIT value is 10.75 (acceptable range 10.64 to 10.86).

rubrics.name: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Operating Profit/ EBIT is any... (ver_23c7b3c130b14d74b6dc2296e3ab34e2)

messages.content: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Operating Profit/ EBIT is any value other than 10.75.

rubrics.name: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 EBITDA value is $25.75 M... (ver_3d08a8015db3418dbba47cd320877add)

messages.content: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 EBITDA value is $25.75 M (acceptable range $25.49 to $26.01).

rubrics.name: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 EBITDA is any value other than... (ver_3d08a8015db3418dbba47cd320877add)

messages.content: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 EBITDA is any value other than $25.75 M.

messages.content: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Net Income value is $7.75 M (acceptable range $7.67 to $7.83).

rubrics.name: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Net Income is any value other... (ver_0b7e22a8f4cd4203a91b33651e492796)

messages.content: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Net Income is any value other than $7.75 M.

rubrics.name: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Free Cash Flow value is $2.75... (ver_43a5247fe96a4b07b82cc590b698931f)

messages.content: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Free Cash Flow value is $2.75 M (acceptable range $2.72 to $2.78).

messages.content: States the updated OPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Free Cash Flow is any value other than $2.75 M.

messages.content: States the updated OPEX and CAPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Depreciation value is $24.00 M (acceptable range $23.76 to $24.24).

messages.content: States the updated OPEX and CAPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Depreciation value is any value other than $24.00 M.

rubrics.name: States the updated OPEX and CAPEX Scenario B model Year 4 EBITDA value is... (ver_44fd941664fb4f8d9c819340317aadbe)

messages.content: States the updated OPEX and CAPEX Scenario B model Year 4 EBITDA value is $34.75 M (acceptable range $34.40 to $35.10).

messages.content: States the updated OPEX and CAPEX Scenario B model Year 4 EBITDA value is any value other than $34.75 M.

messages.content: States the updated OPEX and CAPEX Scenario B model Year 4 Net Income value is $7.75 M (acceptable range $7.67 to $7.83).
